Celigo_Well_Level_Plots

library(ggplate)
library(ggplot2)
file_path <- file.choose()
Condition <- read.csv(file_path, check.names = FALSE)

Condition$Condition <- gsub("\\\\n", "\n", Condition$Condition)
p<-plate_plot(
  data = Condition,
  position = Well,
  value = Condition,
  plate_size = 24,
  plate_type = "round",
    title = "NET Run 16", 
  label = Condition,
  show_legend = FALSE,
  label_size = 1.7,
  title_size = 11,
  #colour = c("#3CB371", "#6495ED", "#8A2BE2", "#EDC764", "#2BE28A", "#48D1CC",  "#BA55D3", "#D1484D",  "#CC7A33", "#66A9AB", "#5A8AC9", "#99CC66", "#CC6699", "#669C94", "#B35A66", "#9B84B3", "#CC7266"),
   colour = c("#3CB371", 
              #"#6495ED", 
              "#8A2BE2", "#ED8A2B", 
              #"#EDC764", 
              "#2B8AED", 
              #"#2BE28A", "#E22B8A", "#48D1CC", "#BA55D3", 
              "#B3ED66", "#D1484D", 
              #"#B33C47", 
              "#CC7A33", "#33CC7A", "#66A9AB", "#5A8AC9", "#A966CC", "#99CC66", "#CC6699", "#669C94", "#B35A66", "#9B84B3", "#CC7266"),
  #colour = c("#E22B8A", "#C22577", "#A21F64", "#821951", "#62133E", "#420D2B", "#220718", "#020105", "#48D1CC", "#BA55D3", "#B3ED66", "#D1484D"),
  scale = 6.2,
  legend_n_row = 5
)

    ggsave("NET_Run16_Platemap.pdf", plot = p, width = 24, height = 16)
    
    plot(p)

p<-plate_plot(
  data = NET_Data_Combined %>% 
    filter(Source == "Run 15",
           ),
  title = "NET Run 15",
  position = Well,
  value = CitH3.Index,
  label = Condition,
  label_size = 1.4, 
  scale = 3.8,
  plate_size = 96,
  plate_type = "round",
  show_legend = TRUE,
) +
    labs(fill = "CitH3\nIndex") 

ggsave("Star_Figure_Heatmap2.png", plot = p, width = 16, height = 12)
print(p)
p<-plate_plot(
  data = NET_Data,
  title = "",
  position = Well,
  value = CitH3.Index,
  label = Condition,
  label_size = 1.4, 
  scale = 3.8,
  plate_size = 96,
  plate_type = "round",
  show_legend = TRUE,
) +
    labs(fill = "CitH3\nIndex") 

ggsave("Star_Figure_Heatmap2.png", plot = p, width = 16, height = 12)
print(p)

all_cols <- colnames(NET_Data)[7:43]
columns_to_plot <- all_cols[all_cols != "Condition"]

for(col_name in columns_to_plot) {
  clean_title <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9%_ ]", " ", col_name)
  p <- plate_plot(
    data = NET_Data,
    title = paste("Run 8" , clean_title),
    title_size = 12,
    position = Well,
    value = !!sym(col_name),
    label = Condition,
    label_size = 1.7,
    scale = 1.2 ,
    plate_size = 24,
    plate_type = "round",
    show_legend = TRUE
  ) +
    labs(fill = "") 
  
clean_file <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_ ]", "_", col_name)
    ggsave(paste0("platemap_", clean_file, ".pdf"), plot = p, width = 6, height = 4)
  
  plot(p)
}
